title: Flame_characteristics_in_a_novel_petal_swirl_burner
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 4]
Here's the extracted technical content:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   The radiative heat transfer is simulated using the discrete transfer method, which solves a transportation equation for the radiation intensity along the paths between two boundary walls.

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**

*   **Table 1: Most physical and chemical processes of coal combustion**

    | Physical and chemical process | Sub-model            | The selected model      |
    | :------------------------------ | :------------------- | :---------------------- |
    | Gas phase turbulent and recirculation | Gas turbulent model | RNG k-epsilon model       |
    | Pulverized coal dispersion       | Two phase turbulent dispersion model   | Discrete random walk model |
    | Devolatilization model          | Coal combustion model        | Two-competing-model      |
    | Char combustion          |  |  Kinetics-diffusion model    |
    | Mixture model         |Turbulent  combustion model  | PDF model |

*   **Table 2: Composition and heating value for the case study coal**

    |                                 |           |
    | :-------------------------------- | :-------- |
    | Proximate analysis (as received) |           |
    | Moisture (%)                    | 7.12      |
    | Ash (%)                         | 25.56     |
    | Volatile (%)                    | 14.39     |
    | Fixed carbon (%)                | 52.93     |
    | Ultimate analysis (as received)   |           |
    | Carbon (%)                      | 58.62     |
    | Hydrogen (%)                    | 3.02      |
    | Nitrogen (%)                    | 0.97      |
    | Oxygen (%)                      | 4.40      |
    | Sulphur (%)                     | 0.31      |
    | Heating value (as received)     |           |
    | Gross calorific value (kcal/kg)   | 5340      |

**4. Diagrams:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Volatile content of the semi-anthracite coal: 14.39%
*   Gross calorific value: 5340 kcal/kg
*   Boiler load : 100%

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters**

*   PSB (Pulverized Semi-Bituminous)
*   Vdaf = 12-18% (Volatile matter, dry ash-free basis)
*   55% - 100% boiler load
*   Particle ignition within 200 mm of the burner exit
* Color Scalar temperatures range: 4.00e+02 to 1.65e+03 K (400 to 1650 K)
*   55% rated capacity of boiler
